name: How do I prove Perplexity's bot visited my Chicago site?

mainEntity.name: How do I prove Perplexity's bot visited my Chicago site?

acceptedAnswer.description: Check server logs for PerplexityBot/Perplexity-User user-agents, matching outputs.[1][2] Tribune alleged same.[6] Key factors: IP traces, timestamps align with queries. Wayback for baselines. Expert forensics if disputed. Chicago venue possible via contacts.[1]
